titleStmt.title: SII 34.312: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 312. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the second gōpura of the Haratīrthēśvara temple, right of entrance.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, •••s/o Mallikārjunarāya, s/o Dēvarāya, Śaka 1436, Bhāva, Uttarāyaṇa, Makara, sudi 11, Friday = A.D. 1515, January 26, Friday.

Incomplete. Gift of land for offerings by Poṉṉambala Toṇḍaimāṉ, the arasu of Aṟantāṅgi at the service called Alaivilañjādāṉ. instituted in his name in the temple of Tiruvaraṅguḷam-uḍaiya-tambirāṉār. The land measuring 12 mā and odd was lying in Kuṇḍarkuḍi in Pālaiyūr-nāḍu. which was his sīrmai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmat Irājātirācan Irāca paramEcuran śrī vīrapradāparāya devarāyamakārā
yar kumāra mallikāṟcuṉa Irāyar kumāra vṛtuvīrācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā ni
ṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 3 10 6ṉ mēṟ cellā niṉṟa bhāva samvaṟsarattu Uttarāyaṇa
ttu makaranāyaṟṟu purvapakṣattu Ēkādeciyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa tiruvātirai
nāḷ Irācairāca vaḷanāṭṭu vallanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷam Uṭai
ya tampirāṉār tirukkōyil Ātiśaṇḍeśvara tēvaṟkku vaṭaveḷḷāṟṟu ṉāṭ
ṭu cuntarapāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu Iḷaṅkōnāṭṭu Aṟantāṅki Aracu Accam
Aṟiyātāṉ Alaivil Añcātāṉ ṇṭāṉ mutalāṉa kiṭatā
Iḷavaṉṉiyar mīcarakaṇṭaṉ śrīmatu poṉṉampala nāta toṇṭaimāṉā m
nam pērālē Alaivil Añcātāṉ canti Āṭiyaruḷiya vamutu ceyyavum tiruppaṇi
kkum Āka viṭṭa nammuṭaiya cīrmaiyāṉa pālaiyūr nāṭṭup pālaiyūṟ kuḷattuppe
riya maṭai veppa vāykkālālum ciṟunaṅkaikkuḷattu maṭaiyālum pala Ūṟaṇi En
taliṉālum nīrpāyntu viḷaiyuṅ kuṇṭarkuṭi vayalil muṉṉāḷ tēvatāṉam tiruvi
ṭaiyāṭṭam kuṭippaṟṟu nīṅkalāka Iṉṉāyiṉārt tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka
nilam Āṟṟu nalla piḷḷaippeṟṟāḷ nilam nālumā Itaṉ teṟkuṭ po
ṟṟāḻi vayakkal nilam 3 Orumā 10 Itaṉ teṟku paḻaṅkarai vayakkal nilam
Itaṉ vaṭakku cuḷakumukki taṭi 1- l nilam 1 mā � Itaṉ teṉmēṟku taṭi 1- l nilam
Āka nilam 10 2mā Iṉṉilam paṉṉiraṇṭumā muntirikaikkum Icainta
perunāṉku Ellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟku Ellai palāṟṟukku mēṟkum ten
Digital edition of SII 34.312 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
